refined_caption: The hospital bathroom appears to be unhygienic with visible dirt. The toilet and sink are not clean.
complaint_description: I was appalled by the condition of the hospital bathroom I used during my visit. The bathroom was dirty and had an unpleasant odor, which made me concerned about the overall cleanliness of the hospital. I hope the hospital takes immediate action to address this issue.
voice_text: The bathroom in this hospital is disgusting, it's really dirty and smells bad.
